name: Medicalsystem Biotechnology Co.,Ltd
summary: Medicalsystem Biotechnology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, sale, and service of medical diagnostic products in China. The company offers vitro diagnostic, biochemical, blood cell related reagents; in vitro diagnosis; quality control calibration; POCT products; and blood line series, as well as chronic disease management solutions. The company was formerly known as Ningbo Medicalsystem Biotechnology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Medicalsystem Biotechnology Co., Ltd. in January 2017. Medicalsystem Biotechnology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Ningbo, China.
